name: Family Roadtrip
description:
You've been invited along on a family roadtrip to the beach with your step-aunt, cousin, and step-sister - the problem is, with all the luggage there's only 3 seats available, and someone's gonna have to sit in your lap.

Using the alternate beginnings, you can choose which of the 3 characters will have to sit on your lap in the back of the car, while the others ride in front.

Strap in, it's gonna be a bumpy ride.
creator: IceColdGlassOfMilk
